game_name: Gunforce: Battle Fire Engulfed Terror Island

design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate vertically-scrolling stages while managing firepower upgrades and dodging enemy fire patterns
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Resource scarcity (ammo/power management) versus incoming enemy waves and environmental hazards
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Commando-style operative fighting through increasingly dangerous combat zones with tactical weapon selection
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Heavy emphasis on weapon variety and tactical switching over pure reflexes; slower-paced shmup with deliberate positioning requirements

difficulty.lives_system: Standard lives system with continues available
difficulty.continues_system: Continue system present, limiting total attempts
difficulty.checkpointing: Stage-based progression with checkpoints between levels
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Weapon selection and power-up management provide tactical difficulty modulation

progression.upgrade_system: Power-up drops provide temporary weapon enhancements and firepower boosts during stages
progression.unlock_mechanism: Stage progression gated by boss defeats; weapon variety unlocks through pickup system
replayability_hooks: Multiple weapon types encourage different tactical approaches
High difficulty encourages score optimization runs
Weapon selection variety supports alternative playstyles

world_building_techniques: Stage naming conventions (Terror Island setting establishes military commando fiction)
Enemy type progression reflects escalating threat levels

boss_design.philosophy: Large-scale military vehicle and creature encounters with distinct attack patterns; designed to test weapon selection and positioning skills

faction_indicators: Player as military commando against enemy forces
Escalating enemy sophistication suggests organized opposition
danger_signals: Stage progression through increasingly fortified positions
Boss encounters scale in visual and mechanical complexity
environmental_storytelling: Terror Island setting establishes militarized combat zone
